name: THE PALE VISITOR
containment: Subject requires ████████-grade barriers at all times. Personnel with less than Level-4 clearance are not to be informed of SCP-7741’s ████████ capabilities. Direct eye contact is strictly prohibited.
description: Humanoid entity, height approximately 2.4m. Skin is uniformly pale. No discernible facial features. Subject demonstrates the ability to ████████ through solid matter at will. Appears to exclusively target isolated personnel. No vocalization recorded.
addendum: Incident 7741-C: Three agents found in [DATA EXPUNGED] state following a 12-minute containment lapse. Cause of ████████ remains under investigation.
